Name: Laptop Stand
Purpose: Acts as a laptop stand for my monitor to mount on top of.

Name: 3D printed cover for screen
Purpose: The main enclosure for the screen as the main base of the monitor.

Name: Power Adapter
Purpose: This part powers the whole product with the help of a 12V, 2A power adapter.

Name: HDMI Cable
Purpose: This cable connects the monitor to my computer in order for the screen to work.

Name: NT140WHM-N44 LCD display controller driver board
Purpose: The purpose of this part is to help control what the LCD screen displays. This LCD controller board acts as a translator and bridge between a video source (like a computer, Raspberry Pi, or media player) and an LCD panel. It converts raw video signals into a format that the screen can understand to display images.
